runs.notes: All acceptance criteria verified. 3 new tests.

_schema.project: Name matching a project in state/projects.md
_schema.skill: Skill that launched the agent (spec-dev, harden, dispatch, ...)
_schema.task: One-line description of what the agent was asked to do
_schema.branch: Feature branch the agent works on, or null
_schema.output: Where the result lives: PR URL, findings file path, content/ doc
_schema.launched: ISO date the agent was spawned
_schema.completed: ISO date the agent finished, or null while running
_schema.notes: Free text: concerns, follow-ups, verification status
